node.html: This project aims to study, analyze, and forecast the supply and demand of electrical energy for the City of Chicago from 2020 to 2027. It uses a combination of OpenAI GenAI models (gpt-4o-mini), AutoGen, and two agent types (CodingAssistantAgent and CodeExecutorAgent) to automate tasks in data engineering, analysis, and forecasting.

frontmatter.title: Image Segmentation using YOLO and SAM

node.html: advanced image segmentation project that leverages the powerful object detection capabilities of YOLOv11 and the state-of-the-art segmentation capabilities of SAM (Segment Anything Model) v2.

frontmatter.title: Peer to Peer Publisher Subscriber System

node.html: The system supports distributed messaging with fault tolerance, topic replication, and high performance. It uses a hypercube topology to connect peer nodes, ensuring efficient routing and scalability. The system is built using Python and leverages asynchronous I/O (asyncio) for handling concurrent operations.

frontmatter.title: Chicago Crime Analysis and Predictive Modeling

node.html: Conducted exploratory data analysis and designed advanced machine learning models (Regression and Clustering) using historical data, improving crime prediction accuracy in Chicago by 15%.

This project is designed to automate the process of scraping job listings, extracting relevant information from the scraped content, and generating personalized cold emails for outreach using LangChain. The pipeline uses a machine learning model, ChatGroq, and document loaders from LangChain to achieve these objectives.
This project is a Face Recognition Attendance System using Computer Vision that uses a webcam to recognize students and record their attendance in a Firebase Realtime Database.
The predictor is designed to forecast stock prices based on historical data. The LSTM model is built using TensorFlow and Keras, and the stock price data is fetched using the Yahoo Finance API.
The Expense Tracker App is a mobile application designed to help users manage their expenses, track spending across different categories, and maintain a record of financial transactions.

frontmatter.title: Sentiment Analysis with Smoothed Bigram Language Model

node.html: This script aims to provide insights into text data using Natural Language Processing (NLP) techniques.

frontmatter.title: NLP Probability Distribution and Entropy Analysis

node.html: This Python script analyzes text data by computing probability distributions, entropy, and KL divergence between datasets. It also calculates the entropy rate of a message given a probability distribution.
Battleships is basically a strategy game played between two players. It allows users to play Battleships against each other on a server or against AI.

frontmatter.title: Restaurant Bill and Inventory Management System

node.html: The Restaurant Bill and Inventory Management System is a Python-based application for managing bills and inventory in a restaurant setting.
This project demonstrates how to process sentences and access their parse trees using Stanza.
This project performs linear regression for predicting salaries based on years of experience.
This project is a digital version of the popular dice game Yahtzee, implemented using Flutter, a cross-platform UI toolkit.
